posts.author: z_kolbeck (Zeina)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
Currently, automations allow subitems to be created from items, but I would like to be able to automate a subitem creation when something changes in an existing subitem or even that the subitem can be moved to another pulse. Is this currently possible, because I can’t seem to figure it out with the automations or has anyone found a workaround?
